company_name: Archimedes Tech SPAC Partners II Co.
description: Archimedes Tech SPAC Partners II Co. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization, or other similar business combination with one or more businesses in the technology industry. Archimedes Tech SPAC Partners II Co. was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Claymont, Delaware.
